mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT op.building_id FROM c_owner_property op WHERE op.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY op.building_id ASC
SELECT assignment_id, user_id, building_id, tenant_id, assigned_by, assigned_at, status, revoke_reason FROM sys_user_building WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY building_id ASC
SELECT assignment_id, user_id, building_id, tenant_id, assigned_by, assigned_at, status, revoke_reason FROM sys_user_building WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND building_id = #{buildingId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_building (user_id, building_id, tenant_id, assigned_by, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{buildingId}, #{tenantId}, #{assignedBy}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM c_owner_property WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId})
